steps.title: State the rectangle area formula
steps.content: The area of a rectangle equals length times width.

steps.title: Apply the formula to the given dimensions
steps.content:
With length = 9 inches and width = 4 inches:
$$A = 9 \times 4 = 36 \text{ square inches}$$
The units become square inches because two lengths are multiplied. That confirms C is correct.
